> [!IMPORTANT]
**OpenCraft is not affiliated with (or supported by) Mojang AB, Minecraft, or Microsoft in any way.** 

# OpenCraft

- [x] Extreme performance, lightweight and accurate
- [x] Works on any device, any OS and any architecture
- [x] Partially supports some features of Minecraft Classic versions before 0.30
- [x] Runs on Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, and in a web browser
- [x] Also runs on OpenBSD, FreeBSD, NetBSD, Solaris, Haiku, IRIX, SerenityOS
- [x] Runs on various consoles (although in various stages of early development)
- [ ] An isometric software rendering graphics backend for weak CPUs

## Security improvements
Our developers have done very good work spotting memory leaks and improving OpenCraft's security.
Here's a summary of what has been recently fixed:
- [x] Memory leaks in SoftGPU graphics backend (12 bytes of RAM leaked)
- [x] Memory leaks in SoftFP graphics backend (1.6 MiB of RAM leaked)
